scope_note: Per HNOTE-AI-TAB-001 (2026-04-17T19:03Z), the ISS-1073 resolution should be expanded beyond the five strawman-label analysis in EXP-171 to include the AI-tab perception-management scope: review-response.html as an AI-steering surface, ai_manifest.json agent_rules as soft prompt injection, context.html relabelled archival as tacit concession, and the daily_review.json self-review pipeline. EXP-173 adds a new Section 8.17 covering these four moves. Decider: integrate BOTH EXP-171 (label analysis, three optional follow-up additions listed in prior proposal) AND EXP-173 (new Section 8.17) before closing ISS-1073. If you prefer to close ISS-1073 immediately on the label-analysis alone, please reopen or create a new issue to carry EXP-173 into Part 8.
summary: Four April-2026 moves catalogued: (1) review-response.html Strawman Control page, (2) ai_manifest.json agent_rules/anti_strawman_rules as pre-evaluation instructions loaded before claim pages, (3) context.html relabelled archival, (4) daily_review.json Groq/Llama (now provider=local) content-flood pipeline. Frames the pattern as escalation from passive AI-misleading (original Part 8 thesis) to active AI-perception-management. Kernel-of-truth paragraph credits methodology.json/audit.html/claim_index.json rigor upgrades as separate genuine contributions.
newsworthy: Dome site April 2026: strawman-control page + ai_manifest agent rules + context.html relabelled archival + daily self-review pipeline = four-layer AI-perception management shipped as a product surface.
